name: STAGE Data Catalog
description: FAIRful metadata catalog for the datasets collected in the scope of STAGE project

name: Core
acronym: Northern Finland Birth Cohorts and Arctic Biobank
description: NFBC1986 is a longitudinal one-year birth cohort study from an unselected population. The cohort included all the mothers (N=9362) with children whose expected date of birth felt between July 1st 1985 - June 30th 1986 in the two northernmost provinces on Finland (Oulu and Lapland).
design description: The original data have been supplemented by data collected with postal questionnaires at the ages of 7, 8 and 16 years and various hospital records and statistical register data. The latest data collection with clinical examinations and questionnaires was at the age of 33 years.
data collection description: The original data have been supplemented by data collected with postal questionnaires at the ages of 7, 8 and 16 years and various hospital records and statistical register data. The latest data collection with clinical examinations and questionnaires was at the age of 33 years.
reason sustained: The original data have been supplemented by data collected with postal questionnaires at the ages of 7, 8 and 16 years and various hospital records and statistical register data. The latest data collection with clinical examinations and questionnaires was at the age of 33 years.
underlying population: Prenatal, Infant (0-23 months), Child (2-12 years), Adolescent (13-17 years), Young adult (18-24 years), Adult (25-44 years)
